Off Calendar May-19-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Default Judgment; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support
Off Calendar May-03-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Gail Dekreon; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:19:09 a.m. and concluding at 11:06:04 a.m.

Plaintiff Marco Antonio Robledo appearing in person, represented by Jason Hain, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.Plaintiff is assisted by a Spanish Language Interpreter, Patrice Binaisa; Certification #301593.
Defendant Elizabeth Abanto not appearing.

Plaintifff's counsel presents summary of facts.
Plaintiff placed under direcet examination.
Plaintiff gives testimony regarding loss of personal property and pain and suffering.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Marco Antonio Robledo, and against Defendant Elizabeth Abanto as follows:

Damages: $865,350.00
Prejudgment Interest: $120,437.75
Attorney Fees: $23,165.00
Costs: $695.00
Other: $7,000.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $1,016,647.75

Plaintiff's counsel to prepare and submit proposed order for review and signature. (D505)
